en.lifeSummary: n.n. was born about 1254, in Ottenbüttel, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany. She married Nicolaus Krummedige von Ottenbüttel about 1273, in Ottenbüttel, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.
